name: linkedincli
description: Access LinkedIn via a reverse-engineered CLI: view profiles, read feed, search people and jobs, and check notifications.
instructions: Read-only LinkedIn access. Configure at least `li_at`. For `feed_list` with `sort=recent`, also provide web cookies (`jsessionid`, `li_gc`, `bcookie`) or `cookies_file`. The init script authenticates automatically. All tools return compact JSON with only the useful fields extracted.

li_at.description: LinkedIn li_at session cookie. Extract from browser DevTools: Application > Cookies > linkedin.com > li_at.

jsessionid.description: Optional LinkedIn JSESSIONID cookie for web-only endpoints such as recent feed sorting.

li_gc.description: Optional LinkedIn li_gc cookie for web-only endpoints such as recent feed sorting.

bcookie.description: Optional LinkedIn bcookie cookie for web-only endpoints such as recent feed sorting.

cookies_file.description: Optional path to a Playwright-format JSON cookie export. Used for web-only endpoints such as recent feed sorting.
